_comment: This is a placeholder baseline. Run 'php tools/ontology_tracker/ontology-check.php --create-baseline' in a working Dédalo environment with database access to generate the actual baseline.

_instructions.how_to_create: Run the CLI tool in an environment with Dédalo configured and database accessible:
_instructions.requirements: Working PostgreSQL database with dd_ontology and matrix_dd tables
_instructions.ci_usage: Add to GitHub Actions workflow to detect breaking ontology changes
